title: Between Two Stones
content:
They poured hot water into people's cups
        in which green tea leaves were floating
        like algae,
        or into red-painted spittoons
        placed on the floor
        which the travellers made frequent use of...
        It was strangely quiet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Between Two Stones"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
